name: OWASP Juice Shop
description: Modern, intentionally insecure web app — covers OWASP Top 10 Tool: n/a. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #993 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map OWASP Juice Shop output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved OWASP Juice Shop output file to parse instead of running it live.
